title: Trondheim Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Trondheim, with a Z-Score of -3.54. This event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Trondheim are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.4 GG indicates a high energy demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity of 63% and wind speed of 5.4 km/h are also contributing to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
